name.zh: 中国乘用车市场信息联席会

description.en: The China Passenger Car Association (CPCA), known in Chinese as 乘联会 (Cheng Lian Hui), is China's leading industry body for passenger vehicle market data. Founded in 2000, CPCA collects and publishes the most granular and timely retail sales data for passenger cars in China — covering narrow passenger cars (乘用车), new energy vehicles (NEVs), and overall automobile market trends. Unlike the China Association of Automobile Manufacturers (CAAM), which reports wholesale figures, CPCA's data tracks actual end-consumer retail sales by brand, model, and fuel type. CPCA's monthly reports are regarded as the most authoritative real-time pulse of China's automotive market and are closely monitored by automakers, investors, and government planners worldwide. The association covers over 80 automakers and hundreds of models, publishing data on domestic production, sales volume, export performance, and NEV penetration rates.
description.zh: 中国乘用车市场信息联席会（乘联会）是中国最权威的乘用车市场数据行业机构，成立于2000年，负责收集和发布中国乘用车零售终端销量数据，涵盖狭义乘用车、新能源汽车（NEV）及整体汽车市场趋势。与中国汽车工业协会（中汽协）发布批发数量不同，乘联会追踪的是按品牌、车型和燃料类型细分的实际消费端零售销量数据。乘联会月报被视为中国汽车市场最权威的实时风向标，受到全球整车企业、投资机构和政府规划部门的密切关注。协会覆盖80多家汽车制造商、数百个车型，发布国内产量、销量、出口表现和新能源渗透率等数据。

en: Monthly retail passenger car sales: total and breakdown by brand, model, segment, and fuel type (ICE, BEV, PHEV, HEV)
New energy vehicle (NEV) penetration rate: monthly share of electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles in total passenger car sales
Auto production data: monthly factory output by vehicle type, brand, and manufacturer
Export statistics: passenger car export volumes by destination country and brand
Ranking tables: top-selling models and brands monthly, with year-over-year comparison
Market share analysis: domestic vs. joint-venture vs. foreign brand performance in China's passenger car market
Segment breakdown: SUV, sedan, MPV, and crossover sales data with trend analysis
EV charging and infrastructure data: public charging station growth alongside NEV adoption statistics
Annual passenger car market summary report: comprehensive year-end review of China's automotive industry performance
zh: 月度乘用车零售销量：按品牌、车型、细分市场和燃料类型（燃油车、纯电动、插混、混动）细分
新能源汽车渗透率：每月新能源和插混车型在乘用车总销量中的占比
汽车产量数据：按车型、品牌和制造商分类的月度工厂产出
出口统计：按目的地国家和品牌划分的乘用车出口量
排行榜：月度畅销车型和品牌，含同比对比数据
市场份额分析：自主品牌、合资品牌和外资品牌在中国乘用车市场的表现
细分市场数据：SUV、轿车、MPV、跨界车销量数据及趋势分析
充电桩和基础设施数据：公共充电站增长情况与新能源汽车普及统计
乘用车市场年度总结报告：中国汽车行业全年业绩综合年终回顾
